subject: A wooden marionette puppet with articulated limbs reaches up toward a red apple hanging from a tree branch, its strings extending up out of frame as if pulled by an unseen puppeteer.
description: A small wooden puppet stands on a leafy branch in a sunlit orchard or apple tree, reaching one carved hand up toward a ripe red apple. The puppet's body is built from segmented wooden parts with visible joints and a painted face; control strings rise from its limbs into the canopy above. Sunlight filters through green and gold leaves in the background, and several red apples are scattered through the foliage. The mood is whimsical and storybook, evoking a Pinocchio-like fairy-tale moment of curiosity.
foreground: wooden marionette puppet reaching for a red apple, control strings visible
background: sunlit tree canopy with green and gold leaves and scattered red apples
